description: Create the complete Flutter translator app with all source code, configuration, and CI/CD pipeline.
steps: Created language model with 35 supported languages
Created translation service using MyMemory API
Created translator screen with Material Design 3 UI
Created GitHub Actions workflow for Web, Android, Windows builds with releases
Created all necessary platform configuration files
acceptance_criteria: All Flutter source code created and compilable
GitHub Actions workflow creates releases with artifacts
verification: GitHub Actions build succeeded for all platforms
Release v1.0.5 created with all 3 artifacts
findings: Flutter 3.44 requires Gradle 8.14+, AGP 8.11.1+, Kotlin 2.2.20+. Best approach: use flutter create to generate platform files in CI.
